name: Breaded Asparagus Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the asparagus in a small amount of water until crisp-tender. Drain well.
2. Combine 1 1/2 cups grated Parmesan cheese and bread crumbs on a plate.
3. In a shallow bowl, stir together eggs, salt, and hot pepper sauce.
4. Dip each asparagus spear into the egg mixture, then roll in crumbs to coat well. Chill for 20 minutes.
5. Heat butter and oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Brown the spears in a single layer, turning carefully. Remove and keep warm while browning the remaining spears.
6. Serve with additional Parmesan cheese if desired.
